scope: Project-level reusable multi-state character creature board for Northern Beastfolk Alliance symbiotic beasts.

locked_references.role: global low-magic eastern epic style lock
project tactile material and palette lock
border-to-north blackstone snowline and Northern palette lock
Northern bone, wood, fur, hide rope, oath cord, and frost material reference
locked existing Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem reference; do not redesign
Wanshou symbol material language reference only
bone flute, bone whistle, oath cord, and handling reference
human handler, siege troop, and equipment scale contrast

design_principles: Treat Northern symbiotic beasts as covenant partners, not monster mounts or a beast horde.
Every beast type must include a readable human or beastfolk handler interaction: bone flute, blood salt, old scar touch, rope handling, pain soothing, refusal of wrong command, or hunting whistle.
Preserve the existing Wanshou emblem as a locked reference only; do not create a new animal crest or enlarged faction badge.
Keep low-magic effects physical and restrained: heat mist, short static arcs, survival fire reflection, bone flute handling, and dream-contract traces.
Use Northern palette and material logic: ochre grass, frozen earth grey, wind-eroded brown, dark hide, bone white, old wood, old iron, dark blood oath cord, blue heat mist, blackstone snow dust.

assets.name_cn: 北境共生兽通用多状态角色板
downstream_usage: episode 09 Minggu Ridge rescue and enemy-reframing beats
episode 11-12 Moon Oath and border-wall alliance memory shots
project-level Prompt Room references for Northern beast interaction shots
